tools.name: get_profile
tools.title: Get my H2GO profile
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's H2GO profile: display name, daily hydration goal (ml), locale, activity level, climate zone, and subscription status.

tools.name: log_water
tools.title: Log a water intake
tools.description: Record a hydration entry for the signed-in H2GO user. Provide volume in milliliters (1–3000 ml).

volume_ml.description: Amount of water consumed, in milliliters.

tools.name: get_today_hydration
tools.title: Get today's hydration
tools.description: Return today's total water intake (ml), the user's daily goal, remaining volume, and the list of entries logged today.

tools.name: get_hydration_history
tools.title: Get hydration history
tools.description: Return daily hydration totals (ml) for the signed-in user over the last N days (1–90, default 7), plus current and best streak.

days.description: Number of past days to return (default 7).
